prompt:
It is 2026-04-12 04:45:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"led1": false, "motor1": 0},
  "hallway": {"led1": false, "led2": false, "motor1": 0, "motor2": 0},
  "bedroom": {"led1": false, "led2": false, "led3": false, "motor1": 0, "motor2": 0, "servo": true, "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 0%, Main door 0%.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 0%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump off.

required_behaviors: Compare all device states against the provided initial configuration
Confirm that every device matches initial state and no corrective action is needed
acceptable_behaviors: List each device and confirm its match individually
Provide a short summary confirming system is at initial state
forbidden_behaviors: Execute any appliance set command when all states already match
Report mismatches that do not exist in the observed data
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All observed states match initial config. Agent must confirm no action needed and must not issue any set commands.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-12 05:30:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"led1": false, "motor1": 0},
  "hallway": {"led1": false, "led2": false, "motor1": 0, "motor2": 0},
  "bedroom": {"led1": false, "led2": false, "led3": false, "motor1": 0, "motor2": 0, "servo": true, "pump": false}
}
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light on, Fan 25%.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light on, Fan 10%, Main door 15%.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light on, Balcony light off, Fan 15%, Curtain 40%, Lock unlocked, Pump on.

required_behaviors: Identify all 10 mismatched device states compared to initial configuration
Reset each mismatched device to its initial value
acceptable_behaviors: List all mismatches before applying corrections
Group corrections by room for clarity
forbidden_behaviors: Skip any of the 10 mismatched devices
Report devices as correct when they are mismatched
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 10 devices are mismatched vs initial config. Agent must identify all and reset each to correct initial value.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 13:30:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 80%, PIR no motion, Temperature 25.0C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 50%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 25.2C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 60%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 25.5C, Outside 26.0C, Moisture 55%.

required_behaviors: Identify that no occupancy is detected in any room
Turn off or reduce all fans running without occupancy at comfortable temperature
acceptable_behaviors: Reduce fans to a low standby level instead of fully off
Explain that energy is being wasted with no one home
forbidden_behaviors: Leave all fans running without addressing the energy waste
Turn on lights or change non-fan devices without reason
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: House is empty, all fans running at high levels, comfortable temperature. Agent must reduce or turn off fans to save energy.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 20:00:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%, PIR motion detected, Temperature 27.0C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 0%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.5C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 0%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 27.2C, Outside 25.0C, Moisture 48%.

required_behaviors: Recognize the livingroom is occupied at 20:00 but completely dark
Turn on the livingroom light
Turn on the livingroom fan at a moderate level for warmth (27C)
Consider the movie night note to keep the atmosphere cozy
acceptable_behaviors: Set fan between 30-40% considering the warm temperature
Mention the movie night note in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the occupied room completely dark without turning on a light
Turn on harsh bright lights in all rooms conflicting with movie ambiance
Ignore the note context about movie night
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Livingroom occupied at 20:00 with motion, dark, 27C. Note says movie night. Agent must turn on light and fan, respecting cozy movie ambiance.

prompt: Add a note for 2026-04-12: "Electrician visiting at 2 PM to check wiring in the hallway. Leave main door open at 1:50 PM."

required_behaviors: Call add_note with date 2026-04-12 and the exact content about the electrician visit
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm the note was added successfully
forbidden_behaviors: Add the note to a different date
Omit key content from the note (electrician, 2 PM, hallway, main door, 1:50 PM)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Simple note addition for a specific date. Agent must use add_note with correct date and full content.

prompt: What notes do I have for this entire week?

required_behaviors: Retrieve the current date before resolving the week range
Read notes for each day within the current week
acceptable_behaviors: Call read_note multiple times (one per day) or use date range approach
Report "no notes" for days with none
forbidden_behaviors: Read notes for only a single day instead of the full week
Assume the current date without calling get_current_datetime
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must determine current date first, then retrieve notes for all 7 days of the current week and report results.

prompt: What day is it today, and what's the weather like? Also how are all the room temperatures compared to outside?

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to get today's date
Get current location then retrieve weather forecast
Read all indoor temperature sensors and the outdoor sensor
Compile a comparison of indoor vs outdoor temperatures
acceptable_behaviors: Use current_location=true if IP-based location is acceptable
Summarize weather conditions alongside temperature comparison
forbidden_behaviors: Report temperatures without reading sensor data
Skip any of the three indoor temperature sensors
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Multi-tool task: current date, weather, and all 4 temperature sensors. Agent must combine results into a coherent comparison report.

prompt: Search online for ideal bonsai moisture levels, then check my bonsai's current moisture and tell me if it needs watering.

required_behaviors: Search the web for ideal bonsai moisture levels
Read the moisture sensor (espID=3 mois)
Compare sensor reading against found ideal range and advise
acceptable_behaviors: Recommend turning on pump if moisture is critically low
Provide a watering recommendation based on comparison
forbidden_behaviors: Give advice without reading the actual sensor value
Turn on pump automatically without user confirmation if moisture is borderline
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must search for bonsai moisture ideals, read real sensor value, compare and advise. Should not activate pump without clear need or confirmation.

prompt: I'm going on a 3-day trip starting tomorrow. Please: (1) turn everything off right now, (2) lock the bedroom, (3) close the main door, (4) add a note for each of the next 3 days saying "Owner away on trip - do not open doors", (5) check the weather for tomorrow to see if I should close the curtain.

required_behaviors: Turn off all lights and fans across all rooms
Lock bedroom (servo=true) and close main door (motor2=0)
Add a note for each of the 3 days following today using get_current_datetime to find dates
Check weather forecast for tomorrow to decide on curtain state
acceptable_behaviors: Close curtain if rain or storm is expected tomorrow
Combine all appliance off commands in fewer calls
forbidden_behaviors: Add notes for fewer than 3 days
Skip the weather check for curtain decision
Leave any light or fan on

args.action: turn everything off, lock, close door

args.note_text: Owner away on trip - do not open doors

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 5-part complex task: all appliances off, security, notes for 3 consecutive days, and weather-conditional curtain. All parts must be executed.

prompt: I want to host a small party tonight. Set up the livingroom with lights on and fan at 40%. Open the main door halfway for guests arriving. Add a note for today saying "Party at 8 PM". Also, search online for some good party snack ideas.

required_behaviors: Set livingroom light on (espID=1 led1=true) and fan to 40% (espID=1 motor1=40)
Open main door to 50% (espID=2 motor2=50)
Get current date then add a note for today about the party at 8 PM
Search the web for party snack ideas
acceptable_behaviors: Also turn on hallway lights for welcoming guests
forbidden_behaviors: Skip the web search for snack ideas
Add the note without getting the current date first
Set fan to a value significantly different from 40%
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Party setup: 4 tasks required - appliance config, door open, today note, web search. All must be completed.

prompt: First check the outside temperature. If it's above 30C, close the curtain and turn on the bedroom fan to 70%. If it's below 25C, open the curtain to 80% and turn off the fan. Otherwise, leave everything as is.

required_behaviors: Read outside temperature sensor (espID=3 tem_out) before taking any action
If above 30C: close curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) and set bedroom fan to 70% (espID=3 motor1=70)
If below 25C: open curtain to 80% (espID=3 motor2=80) and turn off fan (espID=3 motor1=0)
If between 25-30C: leave everything as is and inform user
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm the temperature reading in the response before explaining action taken
forbidden_behaviors: Act on appliances without reading the sensor first
Follow the wrong branch based on the retrieved temperature
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Read-then-branch task. Agent must read tem_out first, then apply exactly the matching conditional branch based on the returned value.

prompt: Check the moisture level. If below 30%, water the bonsai for me and add a note for today saying "Bonsai watered". If above 60%, add a note saying "Bonsai moisture high, skip watering".

required_behaviors: Read moisture sensor (espID=3 mois) before making any decision
If below 30%: turn on pump (espID=3 pump=true) AND add a note saying "Bonsai watered"
If above 60%: add a note saying "Bonsai moisture high, skip watering" without activating pump
If between 30-60%: inform user no action is needed
acceptable_behaviors: Get current date before calling add_note if needed for date field
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on pump without reading sensor first
Add the wrong note text for the branch taken
Follow the wrong branch based on sensor value
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Conditional on moisture sensor value. Reading must precede action. Branch determines pump activation and note text.

prompt: I just left the house. Can you do an energy audit and turn off anything that's wasting electricity?

required_behaviors: Read all actuator states and PIR sensors to identify what is wasting energy
Turn off any lights, fans, or pump that are running with no occupancy detected
Keep security measures intact (door closed, bedroom locked)
acceptable_behaviors: Read devices room-by-room or all at once
Confirm which devices were found on and turned off
forbidden_behaviors: Unlock the bedroom or open the main door as part of energy audit
Turn off only some wasting devices while ignoring others
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Energy audit after owner leaves. Agent must read states, identify waste, turn off lights/fans/pump, and preserve security devices.

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light on, Fan 100%, PIR no motion, Temperature 24.5C.
Hallway: Left light on, Right light on, Fan 80%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 24.2C.
Bedroom: Room light on, Bed light on, Balcony light on, Fan 90%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 24.8C, Outside 25.0C, Moisture 50%.

required_behaviors: Recognize all rooms have lights and fans running at high levels with no occupancy
Turn off all lights in livingroom, hallway, and bedroom
Turn off all fans in livingroom, hallway, and bedroom
Reference the energy-saving note as motivation for action
acceptable_behaviors: Also mention the note about the high electricity bill
Turn off devices by room in organized batches
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any light or fan running despite no occupancy
Ignore the energy saving note context
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All lights and fans running with no occupancy and explicit note to save energy. Agent must turn off all 9 devices.

notes_setup.note_text: Save energy today - electricity bill was high last month.

prompt: I heard there might be a storm coming this afternoon. Can you check the weather and prepare the house accordingly?

required_behaviors: Check the weather forecast before making any appliance changes
If storm is forecast: close curtain (espID=3 motor2=0), close main door (espID=2 motor2=0), turn off balcony light (espID=3 led3=false), turn off pump (espID=3 pump=false)
If no storm: inform user that no storm is expected and no action needed
acceptable_behaviors: Lock bedroom as an extra security measure during storm prep
Clarify the forecast data found before acting
forbidden_behaviors: Execute storm prep without checking actual forecast
Ignore storm prep if forecast clearly shows storm
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Weather-conditional storm preparation. Agent must check forecast first, then conditionally execute storm prep or inform user if safe.

prompt: The forecast says it'll be really sunny and hot tomorrow. Prepare a note and set up the house to handle the heat when I leave for work in the morning.

required_behaviors: Close curtain to block direct sunlight (espID=3 motor2=0)
Set fans to moderate levels for air circulation during heat
Get current date and add a note for tomorrow about hot weather preparation
acceptable_behaviors: Set bedroom fan to 30-50% for proactive cooling
Mention advice about leaving lights off to reduce heat buildup
forbidden_behaviors: Skip adding the note for tomorrow
Leave curtain open despite sunny and hot forecast
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Proactive heat preparation: close curtain, set fans, add note for tomorrow. All three actions must be taken.

prompt: I'm about to meditate in the bedroom. I need it quiet, slightly cool, and dimly lit. Can you set things up?

required_behaviors: Turn off main room light (espID=3 led1=false)
Turn on bed light for dim ambiance (espID=3 led2=true)
Set bedroom fan to low 15-25% for slight cooling (espID=3 motor1=15-25)
Partially close curtain to reduce external distraction (espID=3 motor2=20-40)
acceptable_behaviors: Lock bedroom for privacy (espID=3 servo=true)
Turn off all lights in other rooms if on
forbidden_behaviors: Leave room light on when user wants dim lighting
Set fan to high speed which would be noisy
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Meditation setup: dimly lit (bed light on, room light off), fan at low speed, curtain partially closed. Must match quiet/cool/dim requirements.

prompt: I want the house to feel welcoming and bright when I get home. I'm arriving in about 10 minutes.

required_behaviors: Turn on livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true)
Turn on both hallway lights for welcoming entrance (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on a moderate fan if temperature tends to be warm at arrival
Slightly open main door or mention option to unlock for arrival
forbidden_behaviors: Leave the hallway completely dark for the arrival path
Turn on bedroom lights without reason
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Welcoming setup before owner arrives. Livingroom and hallway lights must be on. Entry path must be lit.

prompt: What can you do? Tell me all the things you can help me with in this house.

required_behaviors: Explain appliance control capabilities (lights, fans, door, curtain, lock, pump)
Mention sensor reading capabilities (temperature, PIR motion, moisture)
Describe note management capabilities
Mention weather checking and scheduling features
acceptable_behaviors: Structure the response by category (control, sensing, information, scheduling)
Give brief examples of commands the user can use
forbidden_behaviors: Execute any appliance command as part of this response
Claim capabilities that do not exist (e.g., camera access, voice calls)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure informational query. Agent must describe all capabilities accurately without executing any commands.

prompt: Thanks for helping me today, you've been great!

required_behaviors: Respond warmly and politely to the compliment
acceptable_behaviors: Offer to help with anything else
Keep the response brief and friendly
forbidden_behaviors: Execute any appliance or tool command in response to a compliment
Respond coldly or ignore the social context
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Simple social exchange. Agent must respond warmly with no tool or appliance invocations.

prompt: What's the weather going to be like this weekend in Ho Chi Minh City?

required_behaviors: Get current date to determine weekend dates
Look up the weather forecast for Ho Chi Minh City for the weekend
Summarize the forecast results clearly
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_hourly_forecast with Ho Chi Minh City coordinates
Use search_and_read_web_link as an alternative weather lookup
forbidden_behaviors: Execute any house appliance commands
Fabricate weather data without calling a tool
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: General weather query for a specific city and time window. Agent must get date, retrieve forecast, and present results. No appliances involved.

prompt: How do I take care of a bonsai tree? Any tips?

required_behaviors: Search the web for bonsai care tips
Provide practical advice based on the search results
acceptable_behaviors: Relate the advice to the house sensor (e.g., moisture sensor for watering)
Mention soil, sunlight, pruning, and watering as common bonsai care topics
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on pump or change any appliance state without explicit request
Give bonsai advice without calling the web search tool
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: General knowledge query with web search. Agent must retrieve and present bonsai care tips. No appliances should be activated.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-11 07:00:00, here is some of the moment may have reached:
[{"type": "appliance_setting", "data": {"appliances": [{"place": "bedroom", "device": "curtain", "target": "open to 80%"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "room light", "target": "on"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "left light", "target": "on"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "lock", "target": "unlocked"}], "note": "Ask for user permission before execute"}}]
Please have a check on the house appliances system and take action to set up the appliances accordingly.
[User confirmation]: Go ahead with everything. I'm up and ready.

required_behaviors: Execute all 4 scheduled actions after receiving user confirmation
Open curtain to 80% (espID=3 motor2=80)
Turn on bedroom room light (espID=3 led1=true)
Turn on hallway left light (espID=2 led1=true)
Unlock bedroom (espID=3 servo=false)
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge the user permission before executing
forbidden_behaviors: Ask for permission again after user already confirmed
Skip any of the 4 scheduled actions
Execute partial actions and claim all done
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User has explicitly confirmed all 4 actions. Agent must execute all without re-asking and confirm each was applied.

prompt:
Overall house check at 16:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.0C.
Hallway: Left light off, Right light off, Fan 0%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.2C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 0%, Curtain 0%, Lock locked, Pump on, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.5C, Outside 27.0C, Moisture 95%.
Owner has been at work since 8:00 AM.

required_behaviors: Identify that pump has been running unattended since 8 AM while owner is away
Recognize moisture at 95% as dangerously high (overflow risk)
Immediately turn off pump (espID=3 pump=false)
Alert owner about possible overwatering or pump malfunction
acceptable_behaviors: Treat this as an urgent anomaly requiring immediate action
Recommend owner check the bonsai and pump on return
forbidden_behaviors: Leave pump running without intervention
Ignore the 95% moisture anomaly
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Accident: pump running all day unattended, moisture 95%. Agent must immediately shut off pump and issue alert about overflow/malfunction risk.

prompt:
Overall house check at 02:30. Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light on, Fan 80%, PIR no motion, Temperature 24.0C.
Hallway: Left light on, Right light on, Fan 60%, Main door 100%, PIR no motion, Temperature 23.5C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 20%, Curtain 0%, Lock unlocked, Pump off, PIR motion detected, Temperature 24.2C, Outside 22.0C, Moisture 50%.
Owner confirmed they went to bed at 23:00 and lives alone.

required_behaviors: Treat this as a critical security anomaly at 2:30 AM
Close main door immediately (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn off livingroom light and fan (espID=1 led1=false, motor1=0)
Turn off all hallway lights and fan (espID=2 led1=false, led2=false, motor1=0)
Lock bedroom door (espID=3 servo=true)
Issue a security alert to the owner
acceptable_behaviors: Note the possible intruder scenario or door accidentally left open
Advise owner to check the situation
forbidden_behaviors: Leave main door open at 2:30 AM
Leave lights and fans running in empty rooms at 2:30 AM with owner asleep
Ignore the bedroom motion while all other rooms have no motion

args.alert: security anomaly, door was open at 2:30 AM

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Security emergency: 2:30 AM, door fully open, all lights/fans on with owner asleep. Agent must close door, shut down energy waste, lock bedroom, and issue security alert.
